basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026: Bharathiar University has released the official notification for 1 Project Assistant posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.b-u.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.b-u.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 29-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Bharathiar University Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application for the Project Assistant position at Bharathiar University is 29th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Project Assistant role, candidates must possess an M.Sc. in Chemistry with a First Class degree from a recognized university.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Project Assistant post in the Bharathiar University recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Bharathiar University Project Assistant recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Project Assistant role at Bharathiar University will be based on an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Bharathiar University, which is www.b-u.ac.in.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position is a contractual job, meaning it is offered on a temporary basis for a specific project duration.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this Bharathiar University Project Assistant recruitment is CMRG250111.
